response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically broad and capable senior engineer with solid craftsmanship practices, but the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role demands director-level IC seniority with recognized, deep AI expertise and demonstrated strategic AI product/platform leadership. His AI exposure is limited to approximately one year of agentic tooling work at re:cinq, with no published research, no ML/AI system design at scale, and no track record advising organizations on AI strategy. The role's preferred qualifications (Master's/PhD in AI, recognized external AI expertise, cloud platform depth) are unmet, and his overall profile is that of a strong staff-level software craftsman rather than a strategic AI principal.
strengths: ETH Zürich CS degree and 16+ years of broad full-stack and systems engineering experience across web, embedded, real-time, and high-performance domains
Entrepreneurial experience founding and maintaining GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform in active production use
Consistent adoption of engineering excellence practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, DX tooling) across multiple orgs
concerns: AI experience is shallow and very recent — limited to one year of MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling with no demonstrated AI product leadership or recognized external thought leadership
No cloud platform strategy or cloud architecture expertise at scale; AWS CDK usage at Optilyz is the only relevant cloud signal
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no published work, patents, or public artifacts that establish credibility as an AI strategist or principal-level technical authority
